ai_disclosure: Drafted and copy-reviewed by AI (Gemini) against the saudade editorial rules. Written for this edition's readers — not translated from English. No human rewrite.

items.headline: Humidity clings to the stone walls of Gyeongbokgung.
items.lede: The summer monsoon season softens the edges of the palace architecture.
items.body: Moss thrives in the shaded corners of the inner courtyards. Visitors move slowly under their umbrellas.

items.headline: Lotus blossoms emerge in the ponds of Seokchon Lake.
items.body: The heavy green leaves rest flat against the water surface. Their pale petals open fully during the humid mid-day heat.
items.lede: Mid-summer brings the quiet bloom of the lotus across the city.

items.headline: Evening cicadas echo through the alleys of Samcheong-dong.
items.lede: The sound rises as the sun dips behind the northern mountains.
items.body: The noise fills the narrow gaps between the old tiled houses. It marks the transition into the deepest part of summer.

items.headline: Wind chimes hum along the wooden verandas of Yanaka.
items.lede: The glass bells catch the breeze between the low-slung neighborhood houses.
items.body: They provide a brief respite from the stagnant heat of the afternoon. Each chime marks a passing current of air.

items.headline: Evening mist settles over the dark waters of the Sumida River.
items.lede: The river reflects the muted glow of the city lights after dusk.
items.body: Barges move silently toward the bay. The humidity makes the skyline appear distant and blurred.

items.headline: Hydrangeas fade to muted parchment colors in public gardens.
items.lede: The peak of the rainy season bloom has passed.
items.body: The petals lose their vibrant blue and violet hues. They bow low toward the damp earth.

items.headline: The Atlantic breeze cools the Alfama district at sunset.
items.lede: A steady salt air replaces the trapped heat of the day.
items.body: Laundry dries quickly on the lines spanning the narrow streets. The stone walls hold the warmth long after dark.

items.headline: Jacaranda petals carpet the cobblestones near the riverfront.
items.lede: The violet remnants of spring linger on the ground.
items.body: They catch in the uneven grooves of the calcada. Pedestrians walk carefully to avoid the slick purple patches.

items.headline: Trams slow their descent toward the Praça do Comércio.
items.lede: The yellow carriages rattle against the tracks with rhythmic precision.
items.body: Passengers lean out of the windows to catch the light. The city moves at a deliberate, measured pace.
